evt_014.label: Drop
evt_014.basis: Company F exited the process after Company F declined the invitation to schedule a management presentation, indicating it was only interested in purchasing limited, select assets of sTec.
evt_014.source_text: addition, on April 24, Company F declined the invitation to schedule a management presentation, indicating it was only interested in purchasing limited, select assets of sTec, and Company F had no further communications with BofA Merrill Lynch

evt_015.label: Drop
evt_015.basis: Company E exited the process after Company E indicated it was also only interested in purchasing limited, select assets of sTec.
evt_015.source_text: or sTec regarding a possible transaction. Shortly thereafter, Company E indicated it was also only interested in purchasing limited, select assets of sTec, and as a result the special committee decided not to continue discussions with Company E.

evt_019.label: Drop
evt_019.basis: Company G exited the process after Company G indicated it would not continue in the process.
evt_019.source_text:  $7.10 per share in cash. Also on May 3, 2013, Company G indicated it would not continue in the process.

evt_029.label: Drop
evt_029.basis: Western Digital Corporation exited the process after WDC was not prepared to move forward with a transaction with sTec at that time.
evt_029.source_text: On May 31, 2013, a representative of WDC communicated to BofA Merrill Lynch that WDC was reevaluating its interest in acquiring sTec, and that WDC was not prepared to move forward with a transaction with sTec at that time. In addition, WDC discontinued their due diligence efforts with the company at that time. BofA Merrill Lynch then contacted the companys officers and Dr. Daly to report the communication from WDC.

evt_030.label: Drop
evt_030.basis: Company D exited the process after Company D would not be in a position to actively conduct due diligence for more than two weeks and was disengaging from the process.
evt_030.source_text: On June 5, 2013 representatives of Company D contacted representatives of BofA Merrill Lynch and indicated that Company D would not be in a position to actively conduct due diligence for more than two weeks and was disengaging from the process. The representatives of BofA Merrill Lynch reported these discussions to our chairman and the companys officers.

evt_028.label: Formal
evt_028.basis: Proposal after final round announcement/deadline with no informal signals.

evt_032.label: Formal
evt_032.basis: Proposal after final round announcement/deadline with no informal signals.

cycle_1.basis: First formal proposal in cycle: evt_025.

initiation_judgment.basis: The board decided to undertake a formal review of strategic alternatives and explore a sale because of operating challenges before any bidder approach became the driving force of the process.

count_reconciliation.assertion: six non-disclosure/confidentiality agreements related to the exploration of a potential sale of the company
count_reconciliation.note: The filing count of six non-disclosure/confidentiality agreements matches the six extracted NDA events.
